drawer.title: Get Quote
drawer.subtitle: Leave contact details for an official quote.

footnotes.a: Professional robot arms provider with OVER 5 years of experience. 100% quality inspection before shipment ensures top-tier reliability.
Sales representatives online 24/7. Send us an inquiry with your specs and expect an official email response within 12 hours.
Standard stock products are shipped within 3-5 business days upon payment. Lead time for bulk or custom orders is subject to contract confirmation.
Specs like repeatability (±0.02mm) are tested in controlled lab environments. Actual results may vary based on load, speed, and environmental humidity.
Full OEM/ODM services supported, including custom colors, Logo printing, and specialized end-effectors. Custom lead time is typically 20-30 days.
Core mechanical parts (motors, reducers) come with a 2-year limited warranty. Global technical support is available to ensure minimal production downtime.
All products comply with international RoHS standards and have passed official CE safety certifications and ISO9001 quality management standards.

r_core.metaDescription: r-Series r-Lite (FR3-C) Cobot platform: 3kg (peak 5kg) payload, 622mm reach, and integrated control for compact precision automation cells.

cards.title: Flange Head L6_flange
cards.description: High-precision flange for quick tool switching.

cards.title: Base Module
cards.description: Low-center base improves stability and damping.

cards.title: Middle Joint J3
cards.description: Core load-bearing joint for smooth pathing.

cards.title: Wrist J5/J6
cards.description: Fine attitude control for tight workspaces.

all_cobots_specs.metaTitleFocus: Full r-Lite / r-Core Cobot lineup & specs
all_cobots_specs.metaDescription: Browse every r‑Series Cobot variant matrix—r-Lite, r-Core, r-Reach, r-Max, r-Ultra—with payloads, reach, joint axes, and power in one place.

r_max.metaDescription: r‑Max Cobot line: FR16–FR20 class heavy payloads, long reach, and stamping or palletizing ready robotic arm options.

humanoid.metaDescription: Humanoid Cobot roadmap: embodied AI, tactile interaction, and next‑gen collaborative robotic arm research partnerships.

selector_comparison.metaDescription: Compare three r‑Series Cobots side by side: payload, reach, axes, and power—pick the right collaborative robotic arm.

selector_advisor.metaDescription: Interactive advisor to match load, reach, and environment to r-Lite, r-Core, and other r‑Series Cobot lines.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: Sales, partnerships, and follow-the-sun service—reach us by email or use the Inquiry entry point sitewide.

accessories.introBody: End tools, vision, controllers, and cabling will be listed by category; placeholder cards below until detail pages ship from locales.

end_effectors.title: End Effectors
end_effectors.body: Grippers, vacuum tooling, and tool changers mapped to Roooll Cobot flange patterns (placeholder).

controllers.title: Controllers
controllers.body: Industrial controllers, I/O expansion, and safety relays (placeholder).

hub.metaDescription: Roooll OS, Roooll Insight, and Integrated Tools form the open Cobot robotic arm software stack for R-series automation.
hub.body: Roooll OS, cloud insight, and integration tooling for the R-series Cobot robotic arm will live here; this hub is staged early for navigation and discovery.

r_ecosystem_roooll_os.metaDescription: Roooll OS runs motion, safety, and device policies for your Cobot robotic arm fleet with deterministic scheduling.
r_ecosystem_roooll_os.body: Operating-system capabilities, APIs, and release cadence for Cobot robotic arms will be published here; placeholder page.

r_ecosystem_roooll_insight.metaDescription: Roooll Insight connects Cobot robotic arm telemetry to cloud dashboards, alerts, and fleet analytics.
r_ecosystem_roooll_insight.body: Cloud monitoring, alerting, and fleet insight for Cobot robotic arms will aggregate here; placeholder page.

r_ecosystem_integrated_tools.metaDescription: Integrated Tools bundle calibrators, simulators, and IDE plugins for Cobot robotic arm integration workflows.
r_ecosystem_integrated_tools.body: Simulation, calibration, IDE plugins, and DevOps tooling will align here; placeholder page.
